hook.name: Mundial
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that runs an autonomous eight-team knockout World Cup inside one dynamic-fee OKB/MUNDIAL pool. Traders pledge a team once; during that team's match their swaps count as shots and volume converts to goals, with golden goals settled inside the scoring swap. Results derive only from swaps and timestamps — no owner, oracle, or randomness. Fans get tiered fee discounts; a 0.20% skim builds a Champions Pot claimed pro-rata by champion fans, leftovers donated to LPs.
